faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.leadLine1: Here are answers to questions we often receive.

publishingSection.titleLine2: turn your trip into something shareable.
publishingSection.leadLine1: With Tabidea, you can publish your plan as a travel note or share it as a blog post.
publishingSection.leadLine2: Use it for pre-trip sharing and post-trip memories.

shiori.title: Travel note
shiori.description: Publish itinerary, costs, and notes in one place. Share the full trip picture with companions and family using a single URL.
shiori.cta: See how to use travel notes

stories.title: Blog
stories.description: Write about the context, insights, and practical tips from your trip. Embed travel notes to create highly practical travel posts.
stories.cta: Learn more about the blog feature

guide.title: Your personal guide
guide.description: AI understands your preferences and suggests a one-of-a-kind plan.

discovery.title: Discover hidden places
discovery.description: Find hidden gems beyond what guidebooks usually cover.

edit.title: Edit your story
edit.description: Plans are fully flexible. Shape the journey story you truly want.

howItWorksSection.title: How to build your trip
howItWorksSection.lead: Very simple, like writing in a journal.

steps.title: Choose destinations and dates
steps.description: Enter where you want to go and your timeframe. Rough ideas are fine.

steps.title: AI creates a draft
steps.description: In seconds, you get a first draft of your travel plan.

steps.title: Customize freely
steps.description: Swap spots you do not like and add fresh ideas.

usageGuideHero.leadLine1: Choose destinations and chat with AI.
usageGuideHero.leadLine2: Turn your wishes into a great travel plan.

storiesPromotionSection.leadLine1: Places they visited, food they tried, and what they felt.
storiesPromotionSection.leadLine2: Real travel stories may inspire your next journey.

highlights.title: 4 days in Kyoto: hidden spot tour
My first solo Taiwan food trip

mock.tipTitle: How to Plan Your Next Trip with AI

examples.note: Start early at Kiyomizu Temple, breathe in Arashiyama bamboo forest, and enjoy Kyoto cuisine in Pontocho at night.
Drive to Kouri Island, visit Churaumi Aquarium, and listen to the waves at sunset beach.
Experience contemporary art at the 21st Century Museum and enjoy fresh seafood bowls at Omicho Market.

travelShioriHeroSection.leadLine1: Browse real plans created by other travelers,
travelShioriHeroSection.leadLine2: and find inspiration for your next trip.

featureCards.title: Real travel stories
featureCards.desc: See firsthand experiences and photo-rich records from people who actually visited.

featureCards.title: Use plans as references
featureCards.desc: Copy plans you like and adapt them into your own journey.

featureCards.title: Search by map
featureCards.desc: Find travel journals by area and discover where you want to go.

featuresSection.title: Make travel more like you.
featuresSection.leadLine1: This is more than a schedule management tool.
featuresSection.leadLine2: Three promises to shape your travel intentions.

freedom.title: You are the main character.
freedom.subtitle: AI is only a suggester.
freedom.desc: Destinations, food, and budget are fully customizable. Start from an AI draft and rewrite it to match your style.

story.title: Keep your story.
story.subtitle: Plans become your journal.
story.desc: Carry your plan as a travel journal. Record memories and photos to complete a story that is uniquely yours.

serendipity.title: Unexpected encounters.
serendipity.subtitle: Travel beyond pure efficiency.
serendipity.desc: Fast routes matter, but detours can be great too. Tabidea helps you meet places you truly wanted to visit.

featuresSection.quoteLine1: "The hero of every trip is always you."
featuresSection.quoteLine2: Tabidea aims to be the partner that understands your feelings most deeply.

howItWorksSection.title: Using it is very simple.
howItWorksSection.lead: Start your trip in three steps.

steps.title: Input
steps.subtitle: Start with rough ideas
steps.desc: Ideas like "I want to see autumn leaves in Kyoto" are enough. You can set budget and days freely.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.subtitle: AI suggests a plan in seconds
steps.desc: AI proposes practical routes and spots based on your preferences, considering travel time and crowding.

steps.title: Go
steps.subtitle: Carry your personal journal
steps.desc: Add or remove spots, save the plan, and carry your travel journal on your phone. Share via URL too.

communitySection.titleLine2: as hints for your next one.
communitySection.leadLine1: Explore real plans created in Tabidea.
communitySection.leadLine2: Copy plans you like and customize them for yourself.

featuresHero.leadLine1: Tabidea helps you plan while talking with AI
featuresHero.leadLine2: to create an itinerary tailored to you.
featuresHero.leadLine3: Here are the key features and how to use them.

featuresDetail.title: Powerful Features
featuresDetail.lead: Everything you need to plan better trips

items.title: AI auto-generates your itinerary
items.description: Answer a few questions and AI drafts an itinerary based on your destination, duration, and budget.
details: Generate day-by-day plans from your inputs
Reflects destination, budget, themes, and companions

items.title: Detailed spot information
items.description: Each spot includes practical context and suggested references so you can concretize your plan.

items.title: Flexible customization
items.description: Generated plans are a starting point. Regenerate or adjust via chat to fit your style.

items.title: Worldwide destinations
items.description: From domestic trips to overseas travel, Tabidea supports a wide range of destinations.
details: Coverage for major domestic and global cities

items.title: Schedule optimization and exports
items.description: Create plans from day trips to long stays and export to your calendar after generation.
details: Flexible support from one-day to long trips

items.title: Companion-aware planning
items.description: Adjust plans for solo trips, couples, families, and groups with suitable experiences.

items.title: Budget and cost estimates
items.description: AI estimates transport, accommodation, meals, and activity costs from your generated plan.

items.title: Theme-based travel ideas
items.description: Plan by themes such as food, history, nature, art, or shopping for deeper experiences.

items.title: More with an account
items.description: With an account, you can save plans without limits and sync across devices.
details: Sync across PC, smartphone, and tablet

howToUse.guideLead: Build your ideal travel plan in five steps

steps.title: Choose destinations
steps.description: Enter where you want to go. You can add multiple candidates for a multi-city plan.
tips: You can add multiple destination candidates
Country or region level input also works

steps.title: Set travel details
steps.description: Provide schedule, budget, companions, and themes. These are reflected in generation.
tips: Select themes like history or food

steps.title: AI generates a plan
steps.description: Based on your input, AI creates an itinerary including spots and movement flow.

steps.title: Customize your plan
steps.description: Refine with regeneration and chat adjustments to match your preferred travel style.

steps.title: Save and share
steps.description: Save completed plans anytime. With a free account you can sync devices, export PDF, and connect calendars.
tips: Export to Google Calendar and more
Sync across PC and mobile when logged in

usageTips.title: Be specific about preferences
usageTips.description: The more specific your request is, the better AI can tailor the itinerary.

usageTips.title: Regenerate as many times as you want
usageTips.description: If you do not like the first output, regenerate with small tweaks and compare.

usageTips.title: Fine-tune with chat
usageTips.description: After generation, adjust details interactively through chat requests.

usageTips.title: Use free-text requests
usageTips.description: You can provide nuanced needs like slower mornings or kid-friendly pacing.

usageTips.title: Verify critical facts
usageTips.description: Always verify opening hours, prices, and regulations with official sources.

postTripReflection.title: How was your trip?
postTripReflection.lead: A quick feedback helps us improve the service.
postTripReflection.commentPlaceholder: Tell us what you felt during your trip...

verified.label: Verified
verified.tooltip: Existence confirmed via Google Places and related sources

collectionPromotion.title: Explore public travel notes
collectionPromotion.leadLine1: See trips shared by other travelers
collectionPromotion.leadLine2: and get ideas for your next journey.

display.disclaimerBody: This information is AI-generated and is not guaranteed to be fully accurate. For any travel decision, always verify official primary sources and decide at your own responsibility.

embeddedTravelInfo.title: Travel Info and Safety Guide
embeddedTravelInfo.footerHint: Information is for reference. Always verify the latest details on official websites.

aiFallback.title: This information is AI-generated
aiFallback.bodyLine1: Official data could not be retrieved, so AI-generated general guidance is shown.
aiFallback.bodyLine2: Please verify accurate information on the MOFA overseas safety website.

stepCompanions.title: Who are you traveling with?
stepCompanions.skipAndCreate: Skip optional items and create plan

solo.label: Solo
solo.desc: A flexible trip where detours and mood-led choices fit easily

couple.label: Couple
couple.desc: A calm trip built around scenery, meals, and time together

anniversary.label: Anniversary
anniversary.desc: A special trip with elevated moments and memorable touches

family_kids.label: Family with kids
family_kids.desc: An easygoing trip with breaks and child-friendly pacing

three_generation.label: Multi-generation
three_generation.desc: A low-strain trip designed so everyone can move comfortably

friends.label: Friends
friends.desc: A lively trip that mixes hotspots and shared memories

girls_trip.label: Girls trip
girls_trip.desc: A stylish trip with cafes, photos, and fun stops

boys_trip.label: Guys trip
boys_trip.desc: A high-energy trip for food, activities, and long days

oshikatsu.label: Fan trip
oshikatsu.desc: A high-excitement trip focused on events and pilgrimage spots

pet.label: With pet
pet.desc: A gentle trip with walks, pauses, and pet-friendly stops

workation.label: Workation
workation.desc: A balanced trip that blends work time and a change of scene

business.label: Business
business.desc: An efficient trip that still leaves room for a solid local moment

stepPace.title: What pace do you prefer?
stepPace.lead: Tailor it to your travel style
stepPace.skipAndCreate: Skip optional items and create plan

relaxed.label: Relaxed
relaxed.desc: A spacious rhythm for meals, views, and unhurried moments

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.desc: A comfortable mix of highlights and breaks

active.label: Active
active.desc: A fuller schedule that still keeps the trip feeling smooth

packed.label: Packed
packed.desc: A maximize-the-day style from morning through night

slider.title: Set by amount

saving.label: Budget
saving.desc: A smart, light-footed trip focused on value

standard.label: Standard
standard.desc: A comfortable trip with a steady, familiar balance

high.label: Comfort+
high.desc: A more polished trip with better stays and dining

luxury.label: Luxury
luxury.desc: A premium trip with standout comfort throughout

stepRegion.title: What kind of trip are you looking for?
stepRegion.lead: Share a rough image or what you want to do

stepFreeText.leadLine1: For example, "I want to visit museums" or "I want quiet cafes".
stepFreeText.placeholder: e.g. I want to explore vintage shops and visit a restaurant with a great night view...

stepPlaces.lead: If yes, we'll prioritize them in your plan

stepDestination.leadLine1: You can include multiple places in one trip.
stepDestination.leadLine2: Enter a city name or idea, then press Enter to add.

stepInitialChoice.lead: AI will suggest a trip that fits you perfectly
stepInitialChoice.privacyLine1: Your input is not used for AI training

stepThemes.title: What kind of trip do you want?
stepThemes.skipAndCreate: Skip optional items and create plan

descriptions.gourmet: A satisfying trip led by local specialties and standout meals
descriptions.cafeHopping: A relaxed trip stitched together by memorable cafes
descriptions.historyCulture: A deeper trip shaped by stories, heritage, and context
descriptions.natureScenery: An open-air trip built around scenery and fresh air
descriptions.spectacularViews: A trip that makes iconic landscapes the main event
descriptions.cityWalk: A trip that enjoys streets, neighborhoods, and everyday atmosphere
descriptions.resort: A low-transfer trip focused on a polished escape
descriptions.relax: A slower trip that leaves space to unwind
descriptions.hiddenSpots: A discovery-led trip that skips the obvious path
descriptions.shopping: An upbeat trip with markets, districts, and good finds
descriptions.art: A creative trip shaped by exhibitions and inspiring spaces
descriptions.architecture: A trip for design details, skylines, and beautiful buildings
descriptions.nightlife: A trip that keeps energy for bars, lights, and live evenings
descriptions.experienceActivity: A memory-first trip centered on doing rather than just seeing
descriptions.localExperience: A grounded trip that gets closer to local life and culture
descriptions.onsenSauna: A restorative trip anchored by hot springs and reset time
descriptions.wellness: A balancing trip with care for body, food, and calm
descriptions.photogenic: A trip that collects scenes worth capturing
descriptions.powerSpots: A reflective trip shaped by shrines, temples, and sacred places
descriptions.seasonalEvents: A timely trip built around what only happens this season
descriptions.adventure: A higher-intensity trip that prioritizes experience value
descriptions.oshikatsu: A high-energy trip shaped by fandom stops and special events
